1: And to sing praises unto thy name, O most High:
3: Upon the harp with a solemn sound.
4: I will triumph in the works of thy hands.
5: And And thy thoughts are very deep.
6: Neither doth a fool understand this.
7: It is It is that they shall be destroyed for ever:
8: But thou, LORD LORD , art most art most high for evermore.
9: All the workers of iniquity shall be scattered.
10: I shall be anointed with fresh oil.
11: And And mine ears shall hear my desire my desire of the wicked that rise up against me.
12: He shall grow like a cedar in Lebanon.
13: Shall flourish in the courts of our God.
14: They shall be fat and flourishing;
15: And there is there is no unrighteousness in him.
